extraction.one_line_summary: GILBERT Philippe attacked on steep climb 3km from finish, bridged to leaders, won sprint with decisive kick
tactical_patterns: SMIT Willie forced split with descent aggression after 85km, exploiting damp roads to fracture peloton before climb.
CONTI Valerio attacked on 12%+ gradients immediately after regaining contact, showing aggressive read of steep terrain.
GILBERT Philippe timed bridge from red jersey group to breakaway precisely on final climb, avoiding early marking.
DECLERCQ Tim sacrificed himself at base of decisive climb for team positioning, textbook leadout abandonment strategy.

rider_signals.SMIT Willie: positive: initiated decisive peloton split on descent through aggressive cornering, though ultimately absorbed by final climb
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: positive: demonstrated exceptional kick at steep gradients finish that separated him from marked breakaway companions
rider_signals.BENNETT George: neutral: paced red jersey group on climbs but showed no GC ambition despite reduced peloton
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: neutral: under pressure during steep sections but survived in red jersey group with defensive riding
rider_signals.CONTI Valerio: positive: timed breakaway acceleration ruthlessly when peloton regrouped, showing tactical awareness beyond youth
rider_signals.BARCELÓ Fernando: negative: second consecutive runner-up finish reveals lack of winning punch despite positioning skill
rider_signals.DECLERCQ Tim: positive: perfectly executed domestique work pulling until climb base before dropping, maximizing team benefit
